description: Najiya bt. Yūsuf (aka Sitt Hidhq), releases her husband Abū al-Surūr (aka Sasson) b. Natan from all obligations and resulting from her marriage contract, and releases both him and his son from the repayment of loans given to them in return for what, is not said. Dated in the final third of Iyyar 1416/ May 1105. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, pp. 181, 465)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
